name: check_issue
description: Collect read-only diagnostic evidence for a concrete local issue. This tool gathers facts only; it does not diagnose, rank root causes, or recommend fixes.

query.description: Original user issue. Used for auto area/target inference.

target.description: Optional app, process, command, package, or subsystem target.

recent_minutes.description: Recent log window in minutes, clamped to 1..1440.

allow_launch_probe.description: For app/input_method evidence only: explicitly allow launching target to sample runtime facts. Defaults to false.

launch_timeout_seconds.description: Seconds to wait after launch probe before sampling pids. Defaults to 3, max 15.
